reasoning: The Philadelphia Eagles won Super Bowl LIX in February 2025. Entering mid-November 2025 (Week 10), they remain strong contenders, tied for the best record in the NFC at 6-2. Betting markets consistently list them as co-favorites to win Super Bowl LX alongside teams like the Buffalo Bills and Detroit Lions. Their preseason odds were +600, translating to roughly an implied probability of 14.3% (before adjusting for the vig). With a solid mid-season record placing them securely in line for a playoff berth and potentially a top seed/bye, their odds remain at least around this baseline. A 13-14% probability accurately weights their status as current betting favorites and dominant NFC team, while accounting for the high inherent variance of an NFL season and postseason.
